# trigger-app-event

Trigger app event hook

## Usage

```bash
agent-device trigger-app-event <event> [payloadJson]
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- None

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | Yes |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | Yes |
| Android device | Yes |
| Android TV | Yes |
